在文件资源管理器中显示: Mostrar en el Explorador de archivos
在文件树中显示: Mostrar en el árbol de archivos
将移至废纸篓，你可以从那里恢复。: Se moverá a la papelera; puedes restaurarlo desde ahí.
正在连接桌面网关: Conectando al gateway de escritorio en vivo
Hermes 后台进程已退出。: El proceso en segundo plano de Hermes finalizó.
Hermes 后台进程在启动期间退出。: El proceso en segundo plano de Hermes finalizó durante el inicio.
与网关的连接已断开: Se perdió la conexión con el gateway
需要登录网关: Se requiere iniciar sesión en el gateway
桌面 IPC 桥不可用。: El puente IPC de escritorio no está disponible.
需要重新登录远程网关: Se requiere iniciar sesión en el gateway remoto
修复会重新运行安装器，在新机器上可能需要几分钟。: La reparación vuelve a ejecutar el instalador y puede tardar unos minutos en una máquina nueva.
在“网关设置”中检查网关 URL 和登录，或切换到本地网关。: Revisa la URL del gateway y el inicio de sesión en Configuración del gateway, o cambia al gateway local.
登录窗口在认证完成前关闭。: La ventana de inicio de sesión se cerró antes de completar la autenticación.
登录远程网关: Iniciar sesión en el gateway remoto
无法复制通知详情: No se pudo copiar el detalle de la notificación
OpenAI TTS 需要 VOICE_TOOLS_OPENAI_KEY 或 O: OpenAI TTS needs VOICE_TOOLS_OPENAI_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY.
配置语音转文字后即可使用语音模式。: Configure speech-to-text to use voice mode.
无法启动语音会话: No se pudo start voice session
此设备不支持当前麦克风约束。: Microphone constraints are not supported by this device.
麦克风正被其他应用占用。: Microphone is already in use by another app.
无法开始麦克风录音。: No se pudo start microphone recording.
当前运行环境不支持麦克风录音。: This runtime does not support microphone recording.
语音转写暂不可用。: Voice transcription is not available yet.
Hermes 正在等待你的回应。: Hermes is waiting for your response.
交换会话栏和文件浏览器的位置: Swap the sessions and file browser sides
选择桌面界面的语言。: Elige el idioma de la interfaz de escritorio.
将所有设置恢复为 Hermes 默认值？: ¿Restablecer toda la configuración a los valores predeterminados de Hermes?
总开关。关闭后将静音下方所有通知。: Master switch. Turn this off to silence every notification below.
完成提醒仅在 Hermes 处于后台时触发。: Completion alerts only fire while Hermes is in the background.
有命令正在等待你批准或拒绝。: A command is waiting for you to approve or reject it.
Hermes 提出了问题，或需要密码或密钥。: Hermes asked a question or needs a password or secret.
Hermes 在后台时完成了一轮对话。: A turn finished while Hermes was in the background.
本轮以错误结束。: A turn ended with an error.
测试已发送。如果没有出现，请检查系统通知权限和专注模式／勿扰模式。: Test sent. If nothing appears, check your OS notification permissions and Focus/Do Not Disturb.
此系统不支持原生通知。: This system does not support native notifications.
智能体回合结束时播放。可在此选择预设并预览。: Plays when an agent turn finishes. Pick a preset and preview it here.
选择固定模式，或让 Hermes 跟随系统设置。: Pick a fixed mode or let Hermes follow your system setting.
产品模式隐藏原始工具数据；技术模式显示完整输入/输出。: Product hides raw tool payloads; Technical shows full input/output.
让整个窗口透出桌面。仅支持 macOS 和 Windows。: See your desktop through the whole window. macOS and Windows only.
对话后方那张淡淡的雕像图片。: The faint statue image behind the conversation.
易读的工具活动与简洁摘要。: Human-friendly tool activity with concise summaries.
包含原始工具参数/结果及底层细节。: Include raw tool args/results and low-level details.
仅桌面端调色板。所选模式叠加其上。: Desktop palettes only. The selected mode is applied on top.
无法安装该主题。: No se pudo install that theme.
调整悬浮宠物的大小，所有界面即时生效。: Resize the floating mascot. Applies everywhere instantly.
空闲时让宠物自己在窗口内四处走动。: Let the pet wander the window on its own while idle.
选择后会自动安装（如需）并设为当前宠物。: Picking one installs it (if needed) and makes it active.
当前没有可开启的宠物。: No pets available to turn on right now.
无法开启宠物。: No se pudo turn the pet on.
无法关闭宠物。: No se pudo turn the pet off.
点击\"立即检查\"以查找更新。: Tap "Check now" to look for updates.
此分区没有可调整的设置。: This section has no adjustable settings.
桌面 IPC 桥未暴露网关设置。: The desktop IPC bridge does not expose gateway settings.
默认连接会用于所有没有自定义覆盖的 profile。: Default connection for every profile that has no override of its own.
环境变量正在控制此桌面会话。: Environment variables are controlling this desktop session.
在 localhost 启动私有 Hermes 后端。这是默认方式，并且可离线工: Start a private Hermes backend on localhost. This is the default and works offline.
将此桌面外壳连接到远程 Hermes 后端。: Conectar this desktop shell to a remote Hermes backend.
只需登录 Hermes Cloud 一次，即可从你账户下的智能体中选择——无需粘: Sign in once to Hermes Cloud and pick from the agents on your account — no URL to paste.
登录 Hermes Cloud 以发现你账户下的智能体。: Iniciar sesión en Hermes Cloud to discover the agents on your account.
你已登录。在下方选择一个智能体；会话会自动刷新。: You are signed in. Pick an agent below; the session refreshes automatically.
此账户下未找到智能体。请在: No agents found on this account. Create one in the
无法加载你的 Hermes Cloud 智能体: No se pudo load your Hermes Cloud agents
无法连接到该智能体: No se pudo connect to that agent
远程 dashboard 后端的基础 URL。支持路径前缀，例如 /hermes: Base URL for the remote dashboard backend. Path prefixes are supported, for example /hermes.
暂时无法访问此网关。请检查 URL；网关响应后会显示认证方式。: No se pudo reach this gateway yet. Check the URL — the auth method will appear once it responds.
此网关使用 OAuth。你已登录，会话会自动刷新。: This gateway uses OAuth. You are signed in; the session refreshes automatically.
此网关使用用户名和密码。请登录以授权此桌面应用。: This gateway uses a username and password. Sign in to authorize this desktop app.
用于 REST 和 WebSocket 访问的 dashboard 会话 tok: The dashboard session token used for REST and WebSocket access. Leave blank to keep the saved token.
在文件管理器中显示 desktop.log，网关启动失败时很有用。: Reveal desktop.log in your file manager — useful when the gateway fails to start.
切换到远程前，请输入远程 URL 并完成登录。: Enter a remote URL and sign in before switching to remote.
切换到远程前，请输入远程 URL 和会话 token。: Enter a remote URL and session token before switching to remote.
测试前，请输入远程 URL 并完成登录。: Enter a remote URL and sign in before testing.
测试前，请输入远程 URL 和会话 token。: Enter a remote URL and session token before testing.
Hermes Desktop 将使用已保存设置重新连接（界面保持打开）。: Hermes Desktop will reconnect using the saved settings — the shell stays open.
网关设置加载失败: No se pudo cargar Gateway settings
无法应用网关设置: No se pudo apply gateway settings
无法保存网关设置: No se pudo save gateway settings
API 密钥加载失败: No se pudo cargar API keys
此类别暂时没有配置项。: Nothing configured in this category yet.
MCP 配置加载失败: No se pudo cargar MCP config
请为此 MCP 服务器提供配置键。: Give this MCP server a config key.
服务器配置必须是 JSON 对象: Server config must be a JSON object
重新加载 MCP 前请先重连网关。: Reconnect the gateway before reloading MCP.
新的工具 schema 将应用到后续回合。: New tool schemas apply to fresh turns.
添加 stdio 或 HTTP 服务器以暴露 MCP 工具。: Add a stdio or HTTP server to expose MCP tools.
MCP 目录加载失败: No se pudo cargar MCP catalog
安装前请填写必需的值。: Fill in the required values before installing.
应用于新会话。可在输入框的模型选择器中临时切换当前对话。: Applies to new sessions. Use the model picker in the composer to hot-swap the active chat.
保存模型默认值失败: No se pudo save model defaults
辅助任务默认使用主模型。你可以为任意任务指定专用模型。: Helper tasks run on the main model by default. Assign a dedicated model to any task to override.
未配置备用模型 — 默认模型失败时才会使用备用模型。: No fallback models — the default model is used unless it fails.
断开连接（在终端中运行移除命令）: Disconnect (runs the removal command in the terminal)
归档一个对话后会显示在这里。: Archive a chat to hide it here.
默认项目目录已更新: Default project directory updated — start a new chat (Ctrl/⌘+N) for it to take effect
无法加载已归档会话: No se pudo load archived sessions
无法更新默认目录: No se pudo update default directory
无法清除默认目录: No se pudo clear default directory
工具配置加载失败: No se pudo cargar Tool configuration
此工具集没有提供方选项；启用后即可使用当前配置。: This toolset has no provider options — enable it and it works with your current setup.
此工具集当前没有可用提供方。: No providers are available for this toolset right now.
包含在 Nous 订阅中；登录 Nous Portal 即可激活。: Included with a Nous subscription — sign in to Nous Portal to activate.
请先选择此后端，然后再更改其模型。: Select this backend first to change its model.
尝试更宽泛的搜索或其他分类。: Try a broader search or different category.
技能中心没有匹配的技能。: No matching skills found in the hub.
该技能没有 SKILL.md 预览。: This skill has no SKILL.md preview.
技能中心加载失败: No se pudo cargar Skill hub
无法加载记忆图谱: No se pudo load memory graph
当 Hermes 为你的工作构建技能和记忆时，会显示在这里。: As Hermes builds skills and memories for your work, they appear here.
粘贴图谱代码以加载。: Paste a map code to load it.
当前回合的子代理实时活动。: Live subagent activity for the current turn.
当某个回合派发任务时，子代理会在此实时显示进度。: When a turn delegates work, child agents stream their progress here.
无法连接到 petdex 画廊。: No se pudo reach the petdex gallery.
请重启 Hermes 以使用宠物功能——当前后端版本过旧。: Restart Hermes to use pets — the backend predates this feature.
无法领养该宠物。: No se pudo adopt that pet.
无法切换宠物显示。: No se pudo toggle the pet.
暂无可用宠物——请在下方选择一个安装。: No pets available — pick one below to install.
输入描述，然后按 Enter 生成四种造型。: Type a description, then press Enter to draft four looks.
按 Enter 根据描述生成四种造型。: Press Enter to draft four looks from your description.
你可以关闭此窗口——完成后 Hermes 会通知你。: You can close this — Hermes will notify you when it’s done.
生成失败——请重试或选择一个建议。: Generation failed — try again or pick a suggestion.
参考图过大。请使用小于 16 MB 的图片。: Reference image is too large. Use one under 16 MB.
无法读取该参考图。请尝试 PNG、JPG、WebP 或 GIF。: No se pudo read that reference image. Try a PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF.
无法连接到 Marketplace。: No se pudo reach the Marketplace.
诊断、备份、维护器与记忆数据: Diagnostics, backups, curator, and memory data
一段时间内的词元、成本与技能活动: Token, cost, and skill activity over time
检查安装、配置与提供方的健康状态: Health-check the install, config, and providers
扫描配置与技能中的风险设置: Scan config and skills for risky settings
打包配置、记忆、技能与会话: Zip config, memories, skills, and sessions
上传脱敏报告与日志，获取可分享链接（6 小时后自动删除）: Upload a redacted report + logs, get shareable links (auto-deletes in 6h)
后台审查并归档过期的智能体自建技能: Background review that archives stale agent-created skills
注入每个会话的内置记忆文件: Built-in memory files injected into every session
消息平台加载失败: No se pudo cargar Messaging platforms
在状态栏重启网关以应用此更改。: Restart the gateway from the status bar to apply this change.
在状态栏启动网关以建立连接。: Start the gateway from the status bar to connect.
此平台无需在此填写令牌。请按上方设置指南操作，然后在下方启用。: This platform does not need a token here. Use the setup guide above, then enable it below.
此更改将在网关重启后生效。: This change takes effect after a gateway restart.
新凭据将在网关重启后生效。: New credentials take effect after a gateway restart.
用 @BotFather 创建一个机器人，然后粘贴它给你的令牌。: Crear a bot with @BotFather, then paste the token it gives you.
推荐。来自 @userinfobot 的逗号分隔数字 ID。不设置则任何人都能私: Recommended. Comma-separated numeric IDs from @userinfobot. Without this, anyone can DM your bot.
仅用于开发。为 true 时，任何人都可以私信 bot，不需要允许列表。: Development only. When true, anyone can DM the bot without an allowlist.
安装 Slack 应用后，在 OAuth & Permissions 中找到 b: Use the bot token from OAuth & Permissions after installing your Slack app.
Socket Mode 需要 app 级令牌。: Use the app-level token required for Socket Mode.
运行中的 signal-cli REST 桥接的 URL。: URL of a running signal-cli REST bridge.
小写字母、数字、连字符和下划线。必须以字母或数字开头。: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens, and underscores. Must start with a letter or digit.
选择一个配置档案以查看其详情。: Select a profile to view its details.
内置于此配置档案的系统提示词与人格指令。: The system prompt and persona instructions baked into this profile.
空的 SOUL.md —— 开始撰写人格设定…: Empty SOUL.md — start writing the persona...
Profiles are independent Hermes environments: separate config, skills, and SOUL.md.
从选中的来源配置档案复制配置、技能和 SOUL.md。: Copies config, skills, and SOUL.md from the selected source profile.
从你的默认配置档案复制配置、技能和 SOUL.md。: Copiar config, skills, and SOUL.md from your default profile.
重命名会更新配置档案目录以及: Renaming updates the profile directory and any wrapper scripts in
复制安装命令失败: No se pudo copy setup command
每月第一天上午 9:00: The first day of each month at 9:00 AM
每个整点: At the top of every hour
。它会立即停止触发。: permanently. It will stop firing immediately.
加载定时任务失败: No se pudo load cron jobs
更新定时任务失败: No se pudo update cron job
触发定时任务失败: No se pudo trigger cron job
删除定时任务失败: No se pudo delete cron job
保存定时任务失败: No se pudo save cron job
更新排程、提示词或投递目标。更改将在下次运行时生效。: Actualizar the schedule, prompt, or delivery target. Changes apply on next run.
排程一个提示词以自动运行。使用 cron 语法或类似\"每 15 分钟\"的自然: Schedule a prompt to run automatically. Use cron syntax or a natural phrase like "every 15 minutes".
总结我未读的 Slack 话题，并把前 5 条邮件发给我…: Summarize my unread Slack threads and email me the top 5...
Cron 表达式，或类似\"每小时\"\"工作日上午 9 点\"的短语。: Cron expression, or phrases like "every hour" or "weekdays at 9am".
仅脚本任务（无 AI 提示词）。任务 ID：: Script-only job (no AI prompt). Job id:
当会话生成图片和文件输出时，它们会显示在这里。: Generated images and file outputs will appear here as sessions produce them.
以单一列表显示会话: Mostrar sessions as a single list
这里的全部已置顶。取消置顶某个对话即可在最近中显示。: Everything here is pinned. Unpin a chat to show it in recents.
为工作区命名并添加一个或多个文件夹。: Name a workspace and add one or more folders.
这会从 Hermes 中移除已保存的项目。文件、git 仓库和工作树保持不变。: This removes the saved project from Hermes. Files, git repos, and worktrees stay untouched.
为这个工作树命名分支。: Name the branch for this worktree.
打开已检出的分支，或为可用分支创建工作树。: Abrir checked-out branches, or create a worktree for a free branch.
无法移除工作树（存在未提交更改？）: No se pudo remove worktree (uncommitted changes?)
无法复制会话 ID: No se pudo copy session ID
给这个对话起一个好记的标题。留空则清除。: Give this chat a memorable title. Leave empty to clear.
打开完整面板 · 退格键关闭: opens the full panel · backspace dismisses
复制所选内容或最后一条助手消息: copy selection or last assistant message
Hermes 将抓取该页面并作为本回合的上下文。: Hermes will fetch the page and include it as context for this turn.
排队的对话多次发送失败。它仍在队列中，请重试发送。: A queued turn kept failing to send. It is still in the queue — try sending it again.
选择一个起始提示词放入输入框。: Pick a starter prompt to drop into the composer.
审查当前更改是否存在回归、遗漏的边界情况和缺失的测试。: Audit the current change for regressions, dropped edge cases, and missing tests.
请审查这部分是否存在缺陷、回归和缺失的测试。: Please review this for bugs, regressions, and missing tests.
在动代码之前先勾勒方案，让 diff 保持聚焦。: Outline an approach before touching code so the diff stays focused.
请在修改代码前制定一个简洁的实现计划。: Please make a concise implementation plan before changing code.
讲解所选代码的工作方式，并链接到关键文件。: Walk through how the selected code works and link to the key files.
请解释这是如何工作的，并指给我关键文件。: Please explain how this works and point me to the key files.
放弃对此文件的更改并将其恢复到已提交状态？此操作无法撤销。: Discard changes to this file and restore it to the committed state? This cannot be undone.
放弃所有更改并将文件恢复到已提交状态？此操作无法撤销。: Discard every change and restore files to the committed state? This cannot be undone.
安装 GitHub CLI (gh) 并登录后可打开 PR: Install the GitHub CLI (gh) and sign in to open PRs
此版本的 Hermes 无法在应用内自行更新。: This version of Hermes can’t update itself from inside the app.
请检查网络连接后重试。: Check your connection and try again.
后端正在运行最新版本。: The backend is running the latest version.
新版 Hermes 已可安装。: A new version of Hermes is ready to install.
已连接的 Hermes 后端有新版本可安装。: A newer version of the connected Hermes backend is ready to install.
已有新版本可用。此安装方式无法显示更新日志。: A newer version is ready. Release notes aren’t available for this install type.
你是从命令行安装的 Hermes，因此更新也需要在那里运行。请将此命令粘贴到终端: You installed Hermes from the command line, so updates run there too. Paste this into your terminal:
下次启动 Hermes 时会使用新版本。: Hermes will pick up the new version next time you launch it.
此窗口会在更新期间关闭，随后 Hermes 会自动重新打开。: This window will close while the update runs, then Hermes reopens on its own.
没有数据丢失。你可以现在重试。: No worries — nothing was lost. You can try again now.
后端正在重启以加载更新…: Backend restarting to load the update…
此后端无法更新。: Actualizar not available for this backend.
后端未恢复在线。更新可能未完成——请检查后端主机。: Backend didn’t come back online. The update may not have completed — check the backend host.
连接模型提供方即可开始对话。大多数选项只需一次点击。: Conectar a model provider to start chatting. Most options take one click.
Hermes 正在完成安装。首次运行通常不到一分钟。: Hermes is finishing install. This usually takes under a minute on first run.
一个订阅，300+ 前沿模型 — 运行 Hermes 的推荐方式: One subscription, 300+ frontier models — the recommended way to run Hermes
一个密钥，数百个模型 — 稳妥的默认选择: One key, hundreds of models — a solid default
将 Hermes 指向本地或自托管的 OpenAI 兼容端点 (vLLM、lla: Point Hermes at a local or self-hosted OpenAI-compatible endpoint (vLLM, llama.cpp, Ollama, etc).
API 密钥（可选 — 仅当端点需要时填写）: API key (optional — only if your endpoint requires one)
打开浏览器登录，然后回到这里继续: Opens your browser to sign in, then continues here
在浏览器中打开验证页面 — Hermes 会自动连接: Opens a verification page in your browser — Hermes connects automatically
先在终端登录一次，然后回来继续对话: Sign in once in your terminal, then come back to chat
复制授权码并粘贴到下面。: Copiar the authorization code and paste it below.
无法加载模型: No se pudieron cargar los modelos
Pro 模型需要付费 Nous 订阅。: Pro models need a paid Nous subscription.
每百万 token 的输入/输出价格: Input / Output price per million tokens
执行需要审批的操作前询问: Ask before actions that require approval
自动评估操作，并在需要时询问: Automatically assess actions and ask when needed
YOLO 已开启 - 自动批准危险命令。点击关闭。Shift+点击可全局切换。: YOLO on — auto-approving dangerous commands. Click to turn off. Shift+click toggles it globally.
YOLO 已关闭 - 点击自动批准危险命令。Shift+点击可全局切换。: YOLO off — click to auto-approve dangerous commands. Shift+click toggles it globally.
浏览已连接后端上的文件夹。: Browse folders on the connected backend.
打开一个项目以浏览文件并查看更改。: Abrir a project to browse its files and review changes.
文件树渲染此文件夹时出错。: The file tree hit an error rendering this folder.
点击选择 · shift 点击扩展 · 拖到输入框: Click to select · shift-click to extend · drag to composer
这看起来像二进制文件: This looks like a binary file
无法复制控制台输出: No se pudo copy console output
让 Hermes 重启服务器: Ask Hermes to restart the server
Hermes 正在后台工作。可在预览控制台查看进度。: Hermes is working in the background. Watch the preview console for progress.
Hermes 无法重启服务器。: Hermes could not restart the server.
无法访问预览页面。: The preview page could not be reached.
朗读失败: Error al leer en voz alta
恢复检查点 — 从此提示重新运行: Restore checkpoint — rerun from this prompt
无法发送审批响应: No se pudo send approval response
澄清请求尚未就绪: Clarify request is not ready yet
无法发送澄清响应: No se pudo send clarify response
无法发送 sudo 密码: No se pudo send sudo password
Hermes 需要你的 sudo 密码来运行特权命令。它只会发送给你的本地 ag: Hermes needs your sudo password to run a privileged command. It is sent only to your local agent.
Hermes 需要一个凭据才能继续。: Hermes needs a credential to continue.
无法读取录制的音频: No se pudo read recorded audio
无法创建新会话: No se pudo create a new session
发送第一条消息前请先添加提供方凭据。: Add a provider credential before sending your first message.
分支前请先开始或恢复一个对话。: Start or resume a chat before branching.
分支此对话前请先停止当前回合。: Stop the current turn before branching this chat.
此消息没有可用于分支的文本。: This message has no text to branch from.
重启桌面后端后，工作目录更改才会应用到当前活跃会话。: Restart the desktop backend to apply cwd changes to this active session.
重启 Hermes 桌面版后可使用保存图片。: Restart Hermes Desktop to use Save Image.
重启 Hermes 桌面版以保存图片: Restart Hermes Desktop to save images
无法将图片写入磁盘。: No se pudo write image to disk.
等待网关超时。`hermes gateway` 是否正在运行？: Timed out waiting for the gateway. Is `hermes gateway` running?
此视图遇到意外错误。你的对话和设置是安全的。: The view hit an unexpected error. Your chats and settings are safe.
